prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The Suez Canal Corridor Area Project (Arabic: مشروع تطوير محور قناة السويس) is a megaproject in Egypt that was launched on 5 August 2014 by President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi and completed in 2015. The project aimed to increase the role of the Suez Canal region in international trade and to develop the canal cities of Suez, Ismailia, and Port Said. The project involved building a new city (Ismailia), an industrial zone, fish farms, encouraging the development of a tech industry, building seven new tunnels between Sinai and Ismailia and Port Said, improving five existing ports, creating new centers for logistics and ship services, and digging a new canal parallel to the Suez Canal. The new canal was constructed to increase capacity by allowing ships to sail in both
B. The Suez Canal Corridor Area Project, known in Arabic as مشروع تطوير محور قناة السويس, represents a significant megaproject situated in Egypt. This undertaking was inaugurated on August 5, 2014, by President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi and reached its conclusion in 2015. The core objective of this initiative was to enhance the Suez Canal region's contribution to global commerce and to foster the growth of the cities along the canal: Suez, Ismailia, and Port Said. The project encompassed several key components: the establishment of a new urban center (Ismailia), the creation of an industrial zone, the development of fish farms, the promotion of a burgeoning technology sector, the construction of seven novel tunnels connecting Sinai with Ismailia and Port Said, the modernization of five pre-existing ports, the establishment of fresh hubs for logistics and maritime services, and the excavation of an additional canal running parallel to the original Suez Canal. This parallel canal was specifically built to augment the canal's capacity, thereby facilitating the simultaneous transit of vessels in opposing directions.
C. The Suez Canal Corridor Area Project (Arabic:     ) was a megaproject in Egypt that was launched on 5 August 2014 by President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi. It aimed to enhance the Suez Canal region's role in international trade and further develop the canal cities of Suez, Ismailia, and Port Said. The project included the development of a new city (Ismailia), an industrial zone, the development of a tech industry, the development of seven new, the
